title: Human Gates, Permissions, and Reversible Autonomy · State Clinic: Least Privilege
summary: Set human review points for a consequential operations agent. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops least privilege increment in a risk-tiered approval matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Give each loop and tool only the capabilities and data required for its current goal.
Place approvals immediately before consequential effects with enough evidence to decide.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
